title: Garlicky Shrimp Bake
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make shrimp bake recipe with a garlicky twist.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together minced garlic, soy sauce, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped bok choy to the bowl and toss to coat with the garlic-soy mixture.
Add the peeled and deveined shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the garlic-soy mixture.
Pour the olive oil into a 9x13-inch baking dish and spread it evenly across the bottom.
Add the shrimp and bok choy mixture to the baking dish and spread it out in an even layer.
Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until the shrimp are pink and cooked through.
Remove the baking dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the garlicky shrimp bake hot, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
